headline: Private Credit Funds Trap $5 Billion as Investors Rush for Exit
summary: Apollo Global Management Inc. and Ares Management Corp. this week became the latest firms to limit redemptions, joining a list that includes the likes of BlackRock Inc. and Morgan Stanley.
